label: Perplexity
description: Query Perplexity's search-grounded LLM API to get up-to-date, cited answers from the web.

form.title: Connect Perplexity
form.subtitle: Paste your Perplexity API key to enable search-grounded AI queries from Anton.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Perplexity API key (starts with pplx-) from perplexity.ai → Settings → API. Quickest way to get started — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get your Perplexity API Key

1. Sign in at [perplexity.ai](https://www.perplexity.ai).
2. Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner, then go to **Settings**.
3. Open the **API** tab.
4. If you haven't already, click **Generate** (or **+ New Key**) to create an API key.
5. Copy the key — it begins with `pplx-`.
6. Paste it into the **API Key** field below.

## Notes

- API access requires a Perplexity Pro subscription or an active API billing plan.
- The key is shown only once at generation time; if you lose it, generate a new one from the same page.
- You can create multiple keys and revoke individual ones under **Settings → API** at any time.
- Keep the key secret — anyone with it can make requests billed to your account.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your Perplexity API key from perplexity.ai → Settings → API. Starts with pplx-.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: The Perplexity model Anton will use by default for requests.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if using a proxy or a custom endpoint. Leave blank to use the default Perplexity API URL.
